scripts.build: npm --prefix ../.. run build:native:release && npm --prefix ../.. run build:native:example-widgets && rolldown -c ./rolldown.config.mjs
scripts.sea: npm --prefix ../.. run build:native:release && npm --prefix ../.. run build:native:example-widgets && node ../../scripts/build-example-sea.mjs spin-triangle
scripts.app: npm run build && npm run start
